summary: All 4 user-reported issues have been addressed and tested. (1) Google OAuth now returns JWT token in /api/auth/session response - verified 'token' field exists. (2) Lead detail dialog shows all fields when clicking a lead row. (3) Edit mode allows editing all lead fields with Save/Cancel buttons. (4) AI Lead Scoring and Enrichment features working via real GPT-5.2 integration.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login returns 'token' field (JWT)
Backend: POST /api/auth/session returns 'token' field (Google OAuth fix)
Backend: GET /api/leads returns list of leads
Backend: POST /api/leads creates new lead successfully
Backend: GET /api/leads/{id} returns full lead detail with all fields
Backend: PUT /api/leads/{id} updates lead successfully
Backend: POST /api/ai/score-lead/{id} returns ai_score 1-100 and updates lead
Backend: POST /api/ai/enrich-lead/{id} returns enrichment data and updates lead
Frontend: Lead list displays with clickable rows
Frontend: Clicking lead row opens detail dialog
Frontend: Detail dialog shows all fields: Email, Phone, Company, Job Title, LinkedIn, Source, Status, AI Score, Notes
Frontend: Edit button present in detail dialog
Frontend: Enrich button present in detail dialog
Frontend: Score button present in detail dialog
Frontend: Edit mode shows all editable fields (12 fields)
Frontend: Edit mode has 'Save Changes' button
Frontend: Edit mode has 'Cancel' button
Frontend: Dropdown menu has 'Edit Lead' option
Frontend: Dropdown menu has 'AI Enrich' option
Frontend: Dropdown menu has 'AI Score' option
Frontend: AI Enrichment populates Company Description field
Frontend: AI Enrichment shows 'AI Enrichment' section with recommended approach
Frontend: AI Scoring displays score badge (e.g., 5/100) in dialog header
Frontend: AI Scoring updates AI Score field in detail view
Frontend: Leads list shows AI score badges for scored leads
seed_data_creation: 2 leads exist in database: John155321 Doe155321 (score: 12) and Test Lead (score: 5, enriched)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 user-reported issues are FIXED. Lead detail dialog opens on row click, shows all fields including email, phone, company, job_title, linkedin_url, source, status, ai_score, notes. Edit mode has 12 editable fields. AI Enrichment uses GPT-5.2 and adds company_description + enrichment object (technologies, interests, recommended_approach). AI Scoring returns 1-100 score. Both leads now have AI scores.

google_oauth_token_fix.change: Now returns 'token' field in response alongside user data
google_oauth_token_fix.frontend_handling: AuthCallback in App.js stores token to localStorage

lead_detail_dialog.trigger: Click on lead row in leads list

ai_lead_scoring.ui_display: Yellow badge with score in dialog header and leads list

ai_lead_enrichment.response: Returns enrichment object with technologies, interests, recommended_approach; updates lead fields
ai_lead_enrichment.ui_display: Purple 'AI Enrichment' section in lead detail dialog
